# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: projects
    type: google::projects

  - name: firewall-rules
    type: google::compute_firewall
    properties:
      projectId: ${project.id}
      network: default
      description: Allow SSH, RDP, HTTP and HTTPS from any source IP
      direction: INGRESS

  - name: ssh-rule
    type: google::compute_firewall_rule
    properties:
      projectId: ${project.id}
      network: default
      name: allow-ssh
      priority: 1000
      targetTags: ["allow-ssh"]
      allowed: ['ICMP', 'tcp:22']

  - name: rdp-rule
    type: google::compute_firewall_rule
    properties:
      projectId: ${project.id}
      network: default
      name: allow-rdp
      priority: 1001
      targetTags: ["allow-rdp"]
      allowed: ['tcp:3389']

  - name: http-rule
    type: google::compute_firewall_rule
    properties:
      projectId: ${project.id}
      network: default
      name: allow-http
      priority: 1002
      targetTags: ["allow-http"]
      allowed: ['tcp:80']

  - name: https-rule
    type: google::compute_firewall_rule
    properties:
      projectId: ${project.id}
      network: default
      name: allow-https
      priority: 1003
      targetTags: ["allow-https"]
      allowed: ['tcp:443']
